headline: Apple's WWDC 2025: Unveiling Ios 26, Liquid Glass Interface And Carplay Enhancements
summary: Apple has unveiled iOS 26 and the Liquid Glass interface at its Worldwide Developers Conference.

headline: Oklo, Quantum Computing And Transocean Are Among Top 10 Mid Cap Gainers Last Week (June 9-13): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: Top mid-cap stocks gain, led by energy companies due to increased oil prices from Middle East conflict. Oklo, Bausch Health, Quantum Computing among top performers.

headline: Naval Ravikant Says Elon Musk's A 'Purist' Recalling Why He Likely Never Speaks To Bill Gates
summary: Naval Ravikant claims Elon Musk stopped talking to Bill Gates because Musk sees money as a tool to achieve his goal of decarbonizing transport.
